message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  DatabaseBorderColor #666666
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor User as U
participant JobManager as JM
participant "Process/Application" as PA
participant ESDM as E
participant "Post Processing" as PP
database "Storage System" as SS
actor Observer as OB

== Observer ==
OB -> OB : collects observations
OB -> SS : (may write directly)

OB -> E : write observation t
E -> E : (transform for efficiency)
E -> SS : write container for observation t

== Simulation Runs ==
JM -> JM : periodically submit job(IN=t, OUT)
JM -> PA : allocates resources and calls
PA -> E : read IN=x
E -> SS : read
SS --> E : return
E --> PA : return
PA -> PA : compute
PA -> E : write async OUT=y

== Value-added products ==
E -> PP : make available
PP -> PP : perform analysis
PP -> SS : (may write directly)
PP --> E : return result
E --> PA : return

note over PA,E
multiple iterations
end note

== Finalise ==
JM --> U : OUT files become visible
@enduml
